description: Analyze recognition memory data from a DRM (Deese-Roediger-McDermott) false memory paradigm using the dataset at ~/pebl/data/drm_recognition_data.csv. Compute the True Recognition Rate, Critical False Memory Rate, and Baseline False Alarm Rate for each participant based on the 'studied', 'critical_lure', and 'unrelated' conditions. Exclude any participants with corrupted data, defined as having 100% 'Yes' responses and a mean reaction time under 100ms. Export a JSON report to ~/pebl/analysis/drm_report.json containing a 'participants' list with individual metrics or exclusion details (id, reason) and a 'group_means' object with the three metrics averaged across all valid participants.

metadata.data_source: Domain-specific cognitive data generator matching Roediger & McDermott (1995) norms
